benefits.name: Domestic Airport Lounge
benefits.details: Any participating domestic airport lounge via Visa network
howToRedeem: Visit any participating domestic airport lounge in the Visa lounge access network.
Present your IndusInd Bank Tiger Visa Signature card at the lounge reception desk along with a valid boarding pass.
Entry is validated — no separate payment required for complimentary visits.
Enjoy the lounge. Your visit count is tracked automatically.
termsAndConditions: Maximum 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar quarter per card (8 visits per year).
Valid boarding pass for the same day's travel is mandatory.
Unused visits do not carry over to the next quarter.
Valid only at participating lounges in the Visa lounge network. Subject to lounge capacity at the time of visit.
Additional visits beyond the free quota will be charged at prevailing lounge rates.

benefits.name: Golf Game / Lesson
benefits.details: 1 complimentary golf game or lesson per quarter
howToRedeem: Contact the golf partner or book via the IndusInd Bank credit card portal.
Advance booking is required — contact the course or partner at least 48 hours in advance.
Present your Tiger Visa Signature card at the golf venue for validation.
The complimentary round or lesson will be activated for your visit.
termsAndConditions: 1 complimentary golf round or lesson per calendar quarter per cardholder.
Advance booking required. Subject to course and slot availability.
Includes green fees or lesson fee only. Caddy, cart, and equipment rental are charged separately.
Unused quarterly entitlements do not carry forward to the next quarter.

benefits.name: BookMyShow Voucher
benefits.details: Movie ticket or events voucher — once every 6 months
howToRedeem: Book on bookmyshow.com or the BookMyShow app.
Select your movie or event and proceed to payment.
Pay using your IndusInd Bank Tiger Visa Signature card.
The ₹500 discount / voucher will be applied automatically at checkout.
termsAndConditions: One complimentary benefit (up to ₹500) per half-year period per cardholder.
Valid on movie tickets and eligible events on the BookMyShow platform only.
Discount is applied when paying with the Tiger Visa Signature card — no separate code needed.
Cannot be combined with other BookMyShow offers. Unused benefit does not carry over.

benefits.name: International Airport Lounge
benefits.details: Any participating international airport lounge via Priority Pass
howToRedeem: Visit any participating international airport lounge in the Priority Pass network.
Present your IndusInd Bank Tiger Visa Signature card at the lounge reception desk along with a valid international boarding pass.
Entry is validated — no separate payment required for complimentary visits.
Your annual visit count is tracked automatically.
termsAndConditions: Maximum 2 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year per card.
Valid international boarding pass for the same day's travel is mandatory.
Unused visits do not carry over to the next year.
Valid only at participating international lounges in the Priority Pass network. Subject to lounge capacity.
Guest charges and additional visits beyond the free quota will be billed at standard lounge rates.

benefits.name: OTT Subscriptions Bundle
benefits.details: 19+ apps — Amazon Prime, Jio Hotstar, SonyLIV, Zee5, ALTBalaji & more
howToRedeem: Log in to the IndusInd Bank credit card portal or mobile app.
Navigate to the OTT benefit section and select your preferred platforms.
Confirm activation — an OTT bundle activation code will be sent to your registered email within 48 hours.
Activate the code on the respective OTT platform(s) before the validity date.
termsAndConditions: 3 months of complimentary access to the OTT bundle per calendar year per cardholder.

Bundle includes 19+ apps: Amazon Prime, Jio Hotstar, SonyLIV, Zee5, ALTBalaji, Ullu, Sanskar, Shemaroo, Chaupal Bhojpuri, Dangal Play, FanCode, DistroTV, ShortsTV, PlayFlix, BhaktiFlix, LionsGate Play, OM TV, Dollywood Play, Stage, Runn TV, VROTT.
Activation code must be used within 30 days of receipt.
Unused benefit does not carry forward to the next calendar year.

benefits.name: Fuel Surcharge Waiver
howToRedeem: Use your IndusInd Bank Tiger Visa Signature card at any fuel pump.
The 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applied automatically at the point of transaction.
No manual redemption or code required.
termsAndConditions: 1% fuel surcharge waiver applicable on transactions between ₹400 and ₹4,000.
Transactions below ₹400 or above ₹4,000 are not eligible for the waiver.
Applicable at all petrol stations across India accepting Visa.
Waiver is applied automatically — no action required.

benefits.name: Reward Points
benefits.details: Tiered accelerator — higher spends earn more points
howToRedeem: Points are auto-credited after each transaction.
Log in to the IndusInd Bank mobile app or IndusMobile portal to view and redeem points.
Redeem for cash credit (1 point = ₹0.40) or airmiles (1.2 miles per point).
Minimum redemption and monthly cash credit cap of ₹5,000 applies.
termsAndConditions: Base rate: 1 point per ₹100 spent on all categories.
Tier 1 (₹1L–₹2.5L annual spends): 2 points per ₹100.
Tier 2 (₹2.5L–₹5L annual spends): 4 points per ₹100.
Tier 3 (₹5L+ annual spends): 6 points per ₹100.
Monthly cash redemption capped at ₹5,000.
Points expire if the card is dormant or closed.
Reward points effective from Sept 1, 2024 structure.

benefits.name: Personal Air Accident Insurance
benefits.details: Accidental Death or Permanent Total Disability (PTD) · T&C apply
howToRedeem: Ensure your Tiger Visa Signature card was used for at least one transaction within 30 days before the incident.
In the event of accidental death or PTD, notify IndusInd Bank at 18602677777 or premium.care@indusind.com promptly.
Submit the claim form with required documents: FIR copy, medical reports, death certificate (if applicable), and card transaction proof.
The insurance team will review and process the claim within the prescribed timeline.
termsAndConditions: Cover of ₹25 lakh for accidental death or permanent total disability (PTD) — air accident only.
Card must have been used for at least one valid transaction within 30 days prior to the incident.
Claim must be filed promptly after the incident. Pre-existing conditions and self-inflicted injuries are excluded.
Coverage is valid only while the card account is active and in good standing with IndusInd Bank.

benefits.name: Zero Liability – Fraud Protection
benefits.details: Unauthorized / counterfeit transaction protection · Report within 48 hours
howToRedeem: Report card loss or unauthorized transaction immediately by calling 18602677777.
IndusInd Bank covers all unauthorized/counterfeit transactions reported within 48 hours of discovering the loss.
File a written dispute within the bank's prescribed timeline to complete the claim.
termsAndConditions: Covers unauthorized and counterfeit transactions reported within 48 hours of discovering the loss.
Cardholder must report the loss immediately — delay beyond 48 hours may void the benefit.
Coverage is void for transactions made by the cardholder or an authorized person.
Subject to IndusInd Bank's fraud protection terms and applicable RBI guidelines.

benefits.name: Concierge Services
benefits.details: Travel, dining reservations, event ticketing & lifestyle assistance
howToRedeem: Call the concierge helpline number on the back of your Tiger Visa Signature card.
Service is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
Describe your request: travel bookings, restaurant reservations, event ticketing, or general lifestyle queries.
The concierge team will coordinate and confirm your request within the agreed timeframe.
termsAndConditions: Available 24/7 for all IndusInd Bank Tiger Visa Signature cardholders.
Covers travel assistance, restaurant reservations, event information, and general lifestyle queries.
Concierge facilitates bookings and information only. Actual third-party costs are borne by the cardholder.
IndusInd Bank reserves the right to modify or discontinue the concierge benefit at any time.
